name: incident-report
description: Machine-readable sibling of the incident / postmortem report: header, summary, an ordered timeline array, root-cause prose, an impact array, and owned follow-up action items. The agent expands each exemplar element, one per item.

slots.description: Extra meta items (duration, detected time, owner); one per array element.
Timeline entry time. The timeline array carries one exemplar element to clone per event.
Root-cause prose; may embed a diff string.
Impact row label (requests failed, error rate, users, data loss, SLA). The impact array carries one exemplar element to clone per row.
Follow-up owner (avatar initials). The followups array carries one exemplar element to clone per action.
Footer provenance / authorship line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.timelineEntry[]: { time: string, event: string, dot: enum[default,impact,mitigated] }
shape.followup[]: { owner: string, action: string, due: string, done: boolean }
